meta.purpose: Priority plan for the first 30 SEO pages to create before scaling IoTEdges content production.

principles: Prioritize pages with clear commercial intent and strong product fit.
Build product and solution pillars before long-tail scale.
Include enough knowledge base pages to support internal linking and technical authority.
Include a small number of case studies to improve trust on solution pages.
Avoid candidate pages that require unverified product capabilities.

field_definitions.page_type: product, solution, knowledge_base, blog_article, or case_study.
field_definitions.title: Recommended page title.
field_definitions.source_database: Database where the topic record is defined.
field_definitions.source_id: ID of the source topic or case record.
field_definitions.priority: SEO/business priority from the source planning model.
field_definitions.why_first: Reason this page belongs in the first 30.
field_definitions.required_internal_links: Minimum links to include when drafting the page.
field_definitions.readiness: not_started, needs_capability_validation, ready_for_brief, drafting, ready_for_review, or published.

pages.title: Industrial IoT Gateway
pages.why_first: Umbrella product pillar that connects gateway, MQTT, Modbus, cellular, edge, and solution pages.
required_internal_links: What Is an Industrial IoT Gateway?
pages.notes: This should become the main commercial gateway hub.

pages.title: MQTT Gateway
pages.why_first: Core product for cloud connectivity and one of the strongest conversion paths for industrial IoT buyers.
required_internal_links: Factory Energy Meter Data Collection with Modbus to MQTT Gateway
pages.notes: Must clearly explain cloud, broker, protocol conversion, and industrial device connectivity.

pages.title: Modbus to MQTT Gateway
pages.why_first: High-intent protocol conversion page that maps directly to energy, solar, factory, and OEM use cases.
pages.notes: This page should include a simple architecture diagram when page templates are built.

pages.title: Industrial RTU
pages.why_first: Core product pillar for water, pump station, oil and gas, SCADA, and remote telemetry searches.
required_internal_links: Remote Pump Station Monitoring with 4G RTU
pages.notes: Position around remote telemetry, alarms, field IO, cellular, and SCADA integration.

pages.title: 4G RTU
pages.why_first: Strong commercial page for remote sites with no wired network, especially water, telecom, oil, and environmental monitoring.
pages.notes: Use 4G/LTE wording carefully and mention supported regions only after capability validation.

pages.title: Remote IO Module
pages.why_first: Core IO product pillar that supports factory, water, building, alarm, and SCADA pages.
required_internal_links: Machine Runtime Monitoring with Remote IO Modules
pages.notes: Must explain DI/DO/AI/AO and Modbus/RS485/Ethernet IO variants.

pages.title: LoRa Gateway
pages.why_first: Core wireless product pillar for agriculture, environment, cold chain, water, and smart city monitoring.
required_internal_links: Greenhouse Monitoring with LoRa Sensors and IoT Gateway
pages.notes: Avoid hard range claims until product antenna/enclosure details are confirmed.

pages.title: Edge Controller
pages.why_first: Needed for factory, machine monitoring, OEM remote diagnostics, and edge computing authority.
required_internal_links: OEM Machine Remote Diagnostics with MQTT Edge Gateway
pages.notes: Validate actual edge logic, local rules, protocol conversion, and buffering features before drafting.

pages.title: Energy Monitoring
pages.why_first: Commercial solution pillar tied directly to MQTT gateway, Modbus meters, and factory/building use cases.
required_internal_links: Factory Energy Meter Data Collection with Modbus to MQTT Gateway
pages.notes: Should support both factories and buildings while linking to more specific pages.

pages.title: Factory Monitoring
pages.why_first: High-value vertical pillar for machine data, Remote IO, edge controller, MQTT, and OEM content.
required_internal_links: Machine Runtime Monitoring with Remote IO Modules
pages.notes: Keep page practical and engineering-focused, not generic Industry 4.0 fluff.

pages.title: Pump Station Monitoring
pages.why_first: Strong water infrastructure conversion page for RTU, Remote IO, 4G, SCADA, alarms, level, pressure, and flow.
required_internal_links: Remote Pump Station Monitoring with 4G RTU
pages.notes: One of the first solution pages to draft after product templates exist.

pages.title: Solar Inverter Monitoring
pages.why_first: High-intent renewable energy topic with strong protocol and product fit.
required_internal_links: Modbus Gateway for Solar Inverter Monitoring
Solar Inverter Monitoring over RS485 and MQTT
pages.notes: Avoid unsupported inverter brand/register specifics.

pages.title: Tank Level Monitoring
pages.why_first: Cross-industry solution for water, oil, fuel, and remote sites with very clear product fit.
required_internal_links: Oil Tank Level Monitoring with 4G RTU
pages.notes: Can become a hub linking to fuel tank, oil tank, and water tank pages.

pages.title: Smart Agriculture
pages.why_first: Good vertical pillar for LoRa gateway, irrigation, greenhouse, soil, and weather monitoring.
required_internal_links: Greenhouse Monitoring with LoRa Sensors and IoT Gateway
pages.notes: Use as a vertical hub; specific pages can follow after pillar.

pages.title: Environmental Monitoring
pages.why_first: Broad vertical pillar for LoRa, RTU, air quality, weather, flood, dust, and noise content.
required_internal_links: Industrial Park Air Quality Monitoring with LoRaWAN Gateway
pages.notes: Should link into air quality, flood, weather, and construction monitoring clusters.

pages.title: Oil & Gas Monitoring
pages.why_first: High-value industrial vertical for pipeline, tank, pressure, remote valve, and 4G RTU pages.
required_internal_links: Oil Tank Level Monitoring with 4G RTU
pages.notes: Avoid hazardous-area certification claims unless hardware certificates are available.

pages.title: Telecom Tower Monitoring
pages.why_first: Good remote site vertical for 4G RTU, power, battery, fuel, cabinet temperature, and alarms.
required_internal_links: Telecom Generator Fuel Tank Monitoring with RTU
pages.notes: Can also support generator/fuel tank long-tail topics.

pages.title: Cold Storage Monitoring
pages.why_first: Commercially clear vertical for LoRa sensors, temperature alarms, food, pharma, and warehouse monitoring.
required_internal_links: Cold Storage Temperature Monitoring with LoRa Gateway
pages.notes: Avoid compliance claims until source cards and customer proof exist.

pages.title: MQTT
pages.why_first: Core technical authority page supporting every MQTT gateway, Modbus-to-MQTT, and cloud monitoring page.
pages.notes: Needs factual source card before drafting.

pages.title: Modbus
pages.why_first: Core protocol authority page supporting Modbus gateway, RTU, Remote IO, energy, solar, and water pages.
pages.notes: Needs factual source card and register/function-code references.

pages.title: RS485
pages.why_first: Supports RS485 gateway, Modbus RTU, RS485 to MQTT, Remote IO, and many field wiring searches.
pages.notes: High practical value; should include diagrams later.

pages.title: LoRaWAN
pages.why_first: Supports LoRa gateway, agriculture, environmental monitoring, cold chain, and smart city content.
pages.notes: Clarify LoRa vs LoRaWAN and gateway/node/network server roles.

pages.title: RTU
pages.why_first: Supports Industrial RTU, 4G RTU, SCADA, water, oil, pump station, and remote monitoring content.
pages.notes: Explain RTU in industrial telemetry, not generic electronics.

pages.title: Remote IO
pages.why_first: Supports Remote IO product pillar, factory automation, SCADA IO, DI/DO/AI/AO and brownfield machine monitoring.
pages.notes: Needs clear IO signal explanations and application examples.

pages.title: How a Modbus to MQTT Gateway Connects Industrial Devices to the Cloud
pages.why_first: Bridges product and technical education for one of the highest-value IoTEdges keyword themes.
pages.notes: Can be drafted as a knowledge-base article rather than a blog if preferred.

pages.title: How to Choose an RTU for Pump Station Monitoring
pages.why_first: Direct BOFU guide for water buyers and a strong support article for RTU and pump station pages.
required_internal_links: Remote Pump Station Monitoring with 4G RTU
pages.notes: Should be drafted after RTU and pump station briefs exist.

pages.title: How to Connect a Modbus Energy Meter to MQTT
pages.why_first: Directly supports energy monitoring and MQTT gateway conversion with a concrete engineering workflow.
required_internal_links: MQTT Gateway for Energy Meter Monitoring
pages.notes: Include a generic register mapping example only after fact source cards are in place.

pages.title: LoRa vs WiFi for IoT Monitoring: Range, Power, and Use Cases
pages.why_first: Supports LoRa gateway, agriculture, environment, and cold chain buyer education.
pages.notes: Avoid exaggerated LoRa range claims; explain field variables.

pages.title: Factory Energy Meter Data Collection with Modbus to MQTT Gateway
pages.why_first: Most reusable proof asset for MQTT gateway, Modbus to MQTT, energy monitoring, and factory monitoring pages.
pages.notes: Requires real or anonymized project data before publishing as a full case.

pages.title: Remote Pump Station Monitoring with 4G RTU
pages.why_first: Most reusable proof asset for RTU, 4G RTU, water monitoring, pump station monitoring, and SCADA remote monitoring.
pages.notes: Requires real or anonymized project data before publishing as a full case.
